transcript: Speaker A: Hi teacher, naan coffee kudikka vandhen. English-la eppadi order pannuradhu? [Hi teacher, I came to drink coffee. How to order in English?] Speaker B: Neenga sollalaam: Can I please get one coffee with less sugar? [You can say: Can I please get one coffee with less sugar?] Speaker A: Can I please get one coffee with less sugar? Enakku strong coffee venu, enna sollalaam? [Can I please get one coffee with less sugar? I want strong coffee, what can I say?] Speaker B: Neenga sollalaam: Can you make the coffee a little strong? [You can say: Can you make the coffee a little strong?] Speaker A: Can you make the coffee a little strong? Okay. Speaker C: Friend, nee yaarukitta English kathukittu irukka? [Friend, who are you learning English from?] Speaker A: SpeakX app podra AI teacher-kitte. [With SpeakX app's AI teacher.] Speaker C: Enakku onnum puriyala. [I don't understand.] Speaker A: Idhu oru app. Idhule AI English teacher-oda daily English pesi practice panna mudiyum. Unakke theriyum, English illanna mariyadhaiyum kidaikka maatte, job-um kidaikka maatte. Adhanaala daily 10-15 minutes SpeakX AI teacher-oda practice pannuren. Ippo pathu dhivasathaga aayiduchu, and my English is better than before. And I can speak very confidently without any fear. [This is an app. In this, you can practice speaking English daily with an AI English teacher. You know, without English you won't get respect or a job. That's why I practice daily for 10-15 minutes with SpeakX AI teacher. Now it's been ten days, and my English is better than before. And I can speak very confidently without any fear.] Speaker C: Enakkum English kathukkanum. Aana adhu costly-nu ninaithen. [I also want to learn English. But I thought it was costly.] Speaker A: Indha app romba cheap. Verum 2 rupaa-ku 7 naal trial irukkudhu. [This app is very cheap. There is a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.] Speaker C: Seri da, ippo SpeakX app download pannuren. [Okay, I will download the SpeakX app now.]
on_screen_text: Hi teacher, naan coffee kudikka vandhen. English-la eppadi order pannuradhu? Neenga sollalaam: Can I please get one coffee with less sugar? Enakku strong coffee venu, enna sollalaam? Can you make the coffee a little strong? Friend, nee yaarukitta English kathukittu irukka? SpeakX app podra AI teacher-kitte. Enakku onnum puriyala. Idhu oru app. AI English teacher-oda daily English pesi practice panna mudiyum. Unakke theriyum, English illanna mariyaadhaiyum kidaikka maatte, job-um kidaikka maatte. Adhanaala daily 10-15 minutes SpeakX AI teacher-oda practice pannuren. pathu dhivasathaga aayiduchu, And my English is better than before. And I can speak very confidently without any fear. Enakkum English katthukkanum. Aenath costly-nu ninaithen. Idha app romba cheap. Verum 2 rupaa-ku 2 naal trial irukkudhu. Seri da, ippo SpeakX app download pannuren. [Hi teacher, I came to drink coffee. How to order in English? You can say: Can I please get one coffee with less sugar? I want strong coffee, what can I say? Can you make the coffee a little strong? Friend, who are you learning English from? With SpeakX app's AI teacher. I don't understand. This is an app. You can practice speaking English daily with an AI English teacher. You know, without English you won't get respect or a job. That's why I practice daily for 10-15 minutes with SpeakX AI teacher. Now it's been ten days, and my English is better than before. And I can speak very confidently without any fear. I also want to learn English. But I thought it was costly. This app is very cheap. There is a 2-day trial for just 2 rupees. Okay, I will download the SpeakX app now.]
summary: A man demonstrates how he uses the SpeakX AI teacher to practice ordering coffee in English. He explains to his friend that the app offers daily speaking practice to build confidence and career prospects. He highlights a special offer of a 7-day trial for just ₹2, prompting her to download the app.
